_comment: Community example DIM loadouts collected from Discord. Copy into user_config.json as the 'dim_loadouts' list (with your own api_key) and run decode_dim.py to see them populated.
_source: Community Discord — Stubby456#6394, StrawHat Kano#6659, and others, May-Oct 2025/2026

dim_loadouts.name: Prismatic Solipsism
dim_loadouts.notes: Keep placing rifts as you get them

dim_loadouts.name: Sniper Burst Damage
dim_loadouts.notes: Run with teammate using D.A.R.C.I. Dynamic Heat Limiter special reload.

dim_loadouts.name: Arc Turret
dim_loadouts.notes: Ad clear + DPS. Stick two anarchy grenades, use super.

dim_loadouts.name: Ergo Sum Ignitions
dim_loadouts.notes: Star Eater + Apotheosis class item. Transcendence → 1 heavy + 2 light, throw transcendence grenade.

dim_loadouts.name: Support Warlock
dim_loadouts.notes: Double rocket pulse for DPS, or Finality's for super regen.

dim_loadouts.name: Getaway Artist
dim_loadouts.notes: Survival + DPS. Turrets for kills, rocket pulse sparingly.

dim_loadouts.name: PK Titan
dim_loadouts.notes: Finality's turret + bait and switch + super + pulse + SMG.

dim_loadouts.name: Hunter Crossbow
dim_loadouts.notes: Weapon stat is the only important stat. Energy ↔ heavy swap speed.

dim_loadouts.name: Non-crit Hunter DPS
dim_loadouts.notes: Star Eater + Galanor. Mint or Psi Aeterna. Bait and switch + super + light attack + transcendence.

dim_loadouts.name: Crit-heavy Lucky Pants
dim_loadouts.notes: Shoot Crimson twice → switch to Uncivil Discourse. Spam A499 while Out of Luck.

dim_loadouts.name: Lucky Pants Nighthawk Swap
dim_loadouts.notes: Quick-swap to Celestial Nighthawk without losing super/abilities.

dim_loadouts.name: Finality + Mint Lucky Pants
dim_loadouts.notes: Alt Lucky Pants build — more damage during Out of Luck.

dim_loadouts.name: Off-meta ECI
dim_loadouts.notes: Off-meta exotic class item build.

dim_loadouts.name: Dark Age Hunt Warlock
dim_loadouts.notes: Warlock build.

dim_loadouts.name: Indra — God of the Tempest
dim_loadouts.notes: Arc themed.

dim_loadouts.name: Rain-bow Mastery
dim_loadouts.notes: Bow build.

dim_loadouts.name: PuppetMaster
dim_loadouts.notes: Puppet master build.

dim_loadouts.name: Sixth Coyote Strand Hunter
dim_loadouts.notes: Sixth Coyote for double dodge / ensnaring slam.

dim_loadouts.name: Raid (short stack 13)
dim_loadouts.notes: Raid loadout.

dim_loadouts.name: Mahoraga (Fashion Only)
dim_loadouts.notes: Fashion-only loadout.

dim_loadouts.name: Getaway Artist Ergo Sum
dim_loadouts.notes: Prismatic Getaway + Ergo Sum combo.

dim_loadouts.name: Contraverse Hold
dim_loadouts.notes: Contraverse Hold PvE build.

dim_loadouts.name: Swarmers Threadling Army
dim_loadouts.notes: Swarmers threadling spam.

dim_loadouts.name: Vespers Radius + Centrifuse
dim_loadouts.notes: Arc build with Vespers Radius and Centrifuse.

dim_loadouts.name: Loki (Fashion Only)
dim_loadouts.notes: Fashion-only loadout — Loki themed.

dim_loadouts.name: MardY's Equipped (Prismatic)
dim_loadouts.notes: Prismatic build (note: '#Prasmatic' tag from author — typo for Prismatic). Shared by MardY1786 31 Oct 2025.

dim_loadouts.name: Void / Arc Staff Swap
dim_loadouts.notes: Tagged #Arc Chest. Build note from author: 'Change the super to arc staff also.' Shared by MardY1786.
